title: webhook — feature keys
description: Features exposed at /auth/me. Gates destination drivers + advanced capabilities by plan tier.

features.description: Master toggle. Off = tenant cannot create subscriptions. Inbound provider webhooks (used internally by channel modules) still function.
Publish events directly to a customer's AWS EventBridge event bus. Enterprise.
Publish events directly to a customer's GCP Pub/Sub topic. Enterprise.
HTTPS with client-certificate authentication. Regulated verticals (banking, gov, health). Enterprise.
Gzip request body. Reduces bandwidth for large payloads. Team + Enterprise.
Subscription-level backoff strategy override. Without this: static strategy only. Team + Enterprise.
Per-subscription payload filter expression via symfony/expression-language. Enterprise.
Pin subscription to a specific api version + auto-upgrade on sunset. Requires versioning module.
